name: Sour Cream Cherry Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups pitted black or red cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cherries into an unbaked 8-inch pie shell.
2. Beat the eggs well, then add the sour cream, sugar (up to 3/4 cup), salt, and almond extract. Mix until thick.
3. Stir in the mixture over the cherries.
4. Top with lattice strips.
5. Bake on the bottom shelf of the oven at 400 degrees F for 25-35 minutes.
